title: U.S. Will Waive Oil Sanctions That Have Long Crimped Iran
summary_full: The preliminary U.S.-Iran deal temporarily waives restrictions that have limited the country’s oil sales and how much money it has been able to make from those exports.
summary_public: The preliminary U.S.-Iran deal temporarily waives restrictions that have limited the country’s oil sales and how much money it has been able to make from those exports.

IR.label: neutral
